verses.text: And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to his purpose.
For whom he did foreknow, he also did predestinate to be conformed to the image of his Son, that he might be the firstborn among many brethren.
Moreover whom he did predestinate, them he also called: and whom he called, them he also justified: and whom he justified, them he also glorified.
What shall we then say to these things? If God be for us, who can be against us?

blurb: Today's major earthquake off Japan reminds us that our world can shake without warning, yet Paul's profound words anchor us in unshakeable truth. When the ground beneath us trembles—whether literally or through life's storms—we have this bedrock promise: God works all things together for good for those who love Him. No earthquake, tsunami alert, or earthly crisis can separate us from His sovereign purpose to shape us into Christ's image.
